detectors.description:
Reentrancy in CancerInu._transfer(address,address,uint256) (CancerInu.sol#697-829):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (CancerInu.sol#769)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (CancerInu.sol#843-855)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (CancerInu.sol#775)
		- _developmentAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (CancerInu.sol#863)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (CancerInu.sol#865)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (CancerInu.sol#827)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (CancerInu.sol#993)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (CancerInu.sol#973)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (CancerInu.sol#975)
	CancerInu._rOwned (CancerInu.sol#357) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- CancerInu._takeTeam(uint256) (CancerInu.sol#987-995)
	- CancerInu._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (CancerInu.sol#947-983)
	- CancerInu.balanceOf(address) (CancerInu.sol#523-527)
	- CancerInu.constructor() (CancerInu.sol#455-487)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (CancerInu.sol#827)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (CancerInu.sol#1001)
	CancerInu._rTotal (CancerInu.sol#369) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- CancerInu._getCurrentSupply() (CancerInu.sol#1151-1163)
	- CancerInu._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (CancerInu.sol#999-1005)
	- CancerInu.constructor() (CancerInu.sol#455-487)
	- CancerInu.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (CancerInu.sol#619-641)

	[CancerInu._rTotal](CancerInu.sol#L369) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
